title: illigera orbiculata
intro: Illigera orbiculata is a plant species that belongs to the family Hernandiaceae, commonly known as a type of evergreen or deciduous climber. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The root of Illigera orbiculata is rich in alkaloids and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as pain relief, wound healing, and immune system support. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Illigera orbiculata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by boiling the roots in water or extracting the active compounds using solvents like ethanol or glycerin.
